name: fr-queue-optimizer-mobile
description: FR Queue Optimizer — Android & iOS companion app

scripts.build: npm run sync:www && npm run build:js
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && node scripts/patch-ios-plugins.js && node scripts/resolve-ios-packages.js
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync:ios && npx cap open ios
